---
title: "Bayesian Final Project Report Template"
---

## Executive Summary

State the scientific question, the main model, the main conclusion, and the main uncertainty caveat.

## Data And Problem Setup

- Data source
- Units of analysis
- Key measurement issues
- Target estimand

## Model Specification

Write the model carefully, including priors and parameterization choices.

## Prior Predictive Checks

Summarize what the priors implied before fitting and any revisions made.

## Posterior Computation

- Inference method
- Tuning choices
- Runtime
- Convergence diagnostics

## Posterior Results

Report:

- parameter summaries;
- transformed scientific quantities;
- predictive summaries.

## Model Criticism

Include posterior predictive checks, residual checks, or calibration checks as appropriate.

## Sensitivity Analysis

Document how the main conclusions changed under plausible alternative assumptions.

## Predictive Or Decision Evaluation

Explain how models were compared and why the reported metric matches the scientific goal.

## Limitations

State clearly:

- remaining model assumptions;
- unresolved computational issues;
- threats to interpretation.

## Reproducibility

- repository structure;
- environment information;
- instructions to rerun the analysis.
